title: villamilla octandra
intro: Villamilla octandra, also known as the wild yam or Mexican wild yam, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating menstrual disorders, such as cramps and infertility, due to its estrogen-like properties. The health benefits of Villamilla octandra include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting reproductive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are commonly used in traditional medicine and some modern supplements.
